home.heroPill: Built for English centers in Vietnam
home.heroTitle: Run a more professional English center.
home.heroLead: Teachers log a lesson in one minute. Parents read it on Zalo. Everything in one place — instead of a dozen messy Zalo groups.
home.stat2Label: Send the PDF to parents on Zalo
home.rolesTitle: Each role sees its own view
home.rolesSub: The same data, three different jobs — everyone sees exactly what they need.
home.role1Body: See which teachers log regularly and who's behind. Track attendance and homework by week. Customize the logo and report template to your brand.
home.role2Body: After class, enter vocabulary and grammar once for the whole class, quick-rate each student — done in 60 seconds, right on your phone.
home.role3Body: Log in with your phone number (no email needed). See what your child learned, how homework went, and download a PDF with letterhead to send the grandparents.
home.pdfTitle: A branded PDF report — in one tap
home.pdfLead: Every parent gets a beautifully designed monthly report: center logo, teacher notes, your child's progress. Parents screenshot the “Highlights” to share with family — free marketing for the center.
home.pdfItem1: Carries the center's logo and brand color
home.pdfItem3: Auto-generates a “Highlights” section parents love to share
home.pdfItem4: Bilingual: parents pick Vietnamese or English
home.before1: Messages mix parents, teachers and personal life
home.before2: Parents ask “what did my child learn?” every day
home.before3: No idea which teacher is logging regularly
home.before4: Month-end: writing reports by hand for each parent
home.before5: Parents don't see the value → hard to retain or raise prices
home.after1: Per-student messages — private and easy to find again
home.after2: Parents read the report themselves, no need to ask the teacher
home.after3: Analytics show exactly who's behind and who's on track
home.after4: Auto-generated PDF reports — you just preview and send
home.after5: Parents see value every week → easier to retain and raise prices
home.founderQuote: “I built Klazly after watching the English centers around me wrestle with the same problem: messy Zalo groups, parents constantly asking ‘what did my child learn today?’. I'm looking for 5 centers to build it with — Founding Centers: 30 days free, 1-on-1 setup help, and a price locked forever.”
home.founderRole: Founder of Klazly · Hải Phòng, Vietnam
home.pricingSub: Pay monthly to try it, or a longer plan to save. Founding Center pricing is locked forever.
home.priceYearDesc: Save 4.500.000đ and lock the launch price forever.
home.pricingIncludesRest: unlimited classes / students / parents / teachers · unlimited PDF reports · document library · Zalo–email support + free updates
home.ctaTitle: Ready to run a more professional center?
home.ctaSub: Message me on Zalo. Setup help over Zalo, Founding Center pricing locked forever.
home.footerDesc: A professional management platform for English centers in Vietnam. Manage teachers, log every lesson, and retain parents with automatic PDF reports.

inAppHint.body: Tap the menu (⋮) in your browser and choose 'Open in browser' to open Zalo properly.

founder.title: Built by a founder, for Vietnamese centers
founder.paragraph1: I'm Matthew, based in Hai Phong.
founder.paragraph2: I built Klazly after watching English centers around me struggle with the same thing: chaotic Zalo groups, parents asking "what did my child learn today?" over and over, and owners with no time to answer each one.
founder.paragraph3: Right now I'm looking for 5 centers in Vietnam to build this product with me. I call them Founding Centers. In exchange, these centers get:
founder.benefit2: Setup help and teacher guidance over Zalo
founder.benefit3: Founding Center pricing locked forever (about 50% off)
founder.benefit4: Direct influence on what I build next
founder.closing: I'm one person. If something breaks, you message me directly on Zalo — not a support queue. Same channel if you want to talk.
founder.fullHeadline: Cohort is full. Join the waitlist.
founder.openSubtext: Hand-picked pilot centers, locked discounted rate forever.
founder.fullSubtext: All current Founding spots filled. Message me to join the waitlist for the next cohort.
founder.loginTagline: Built in Hai Phong for Vietnamese English centers.
founder.pricingPanelSubtitle: Five hand-picked centers helping shape the product. Once these spots are gone, the next cohort opens later.

founding.fullHeadline: Cohort is full. Join the waitlist.
founding.openSubtext: Hand-picked pilot centers, locked discounted rate forever.
founding.fullSubtext: All current Founding spots filled. Message me to join the waitlist for the next cohort.

pricingPage.faq5Q: What if I have multiple centers?
pricingPage.faq5A: Message me on Zalo and I'll work out custom pricing for multi-center setups.
pricingPage.faq6A: Most centers are fully set up in under 30 minutes. For Founding Centers I help walk through setup and teacher onboarding over Zalo.
pricingPage.ctaSubtitle: Message us on Zalo — we reply faster than email.
pricingPage.guaranteeBar: Cancel anytime · Setup help over Zalo · Founding Center pricing locked forever

landing.title: Klazly
landing.tagline: The management platform for English centers in Vietnam.
landing.heroTitle: Run a more professional English center.
landing.heroSubtitle: A management platform for English centers in Vietnam. Your teachers log lessons in a minute; parents read them on Zalo. You finally have one place for it all instead of fifteen Zalo group chats.
landing.statsBandLabel: Built for the work, not the show
landing.stat2Label: PDF to a parent on Zalo
landing.stat4Label: From sign-up to first parent login
landing.dayTitle: A day at a center on Klazly
landing.daySubtitle: Same Monday, three people, three jobs — running smoothly instead of scattered.
landing.dayMorningBody: You open Klazly on your phone with your coffee. You see last week Ms. Linh logged 6 lessons, Ms. Ha logged 0. You message Ms. Ha on Zalo: "Don't forget to log lessons". 30 seconds.
landing.dayAfternoonBody: Ms. Linh just finished Junior A. She opens the app, picks the class, logs Unit 4 — Animals: vocabulary, grammar, homework. Rates 12 students with one tap each. Done in a minute.
landing.dayEveningBody: Ms. Mai opens Klazly on her phone after dinner. She sees what her child learned today, how the homework went, what Ms. Linh wrote. Downloads the weekly PDF, sends it to grandparents on Zalo. Doesn't have to ask anyone.
landing.audienceSubtitle: Center owners, teachers, and parents each get a view built around the job they need to do. Same data, three different jobs.
landing.audienceOwnerDesc: You see which teachers are logging consistently and which aren't. You track homework completion and behavior across the week. Everything to do with classes, students, and parents lives in one place instead of in your head.
landing.audienceOwnerBullet1: Center-wide analytics on a single dashboard
landing.audienceOwnerBullet2: Spot teachers who haven't logged this week
landing.audienceOwnerBullet3: Your logo and letterhead on every report
landing.audienceTeacherDesc: After class your teacher opens the app on their phone, logs the lesson once for the whole class, then quick-rates each student. No paper. No mixing work into their personal Zalo.
landing.audienceParentDesc: Parents sign in on their phone (phone number is fine, no email needed). They see what their child learned today, how the homework went, and how the teacher rated behavior. One tap downloads a PDF with your center's letterhead to share with grandparents.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Things you'll use from day one.
landing.feat1Title: Branded PDF reports in one tap
landing.feat1Body: Every parent gets a beautifully designed monthly report. Your center's branding, your teacher's voice, your child's progress. Parents screenshot the highlights to forward to family — free marketing for you.
landing.feat1B1: Branded with your center's logo and colors
landing.feat1B2: Rich lesson detail: vocabulary, grammar, teacher's notes
landing.feat1B3: Auto-generated highlights parents share with family
landing.feat1B4: Bilingual: parents pick VI or EN
landing.feat2Title: Parents open their phone, see today's lesson in seconds
landing.feat2Body: Parents don't have to scroll through Zalo groups or message the teacher again. They sign in and the vocabulary, grammar, homework, and notes for their child are right there.
landing.feat2B3: Sign in by phone number (no email needed)
landing.feat3Title: Know instantly which teachers are behind on logging
landing.feat3Body: Owner analytics show who's keeping up and who's slipping. So when you talk to a teacher about consistency, you have real data instead of a feeling.
landing.feat3B1: Count lessons logged per week per teacher
landing.feat3B2: Red flag for teachers with 0 lessons this week
landing.feat3B3: Attendance and homework trends by class, by student
landing.feat4Title: Reports go straight into Zalo in one tap
landing.feat4Body: Vietnamese parents live on Zalo. Every PDF report has a Share via Zalo button built in. Nothing for your parents to install, nothing to teach them.
landing.feat4B1: Built-in Zalo share on every report
landing.feat4B2: Parents get it in Zalo (no separate app needed)
landing.feat4B3: Easy to forward to grandparents or family
landing.feat5Title: Vietnamese to English in one click
landing.feat5Body: Got foreign teachers? The English UI is built in. Parents read reports in Vietnamese while teachers log in English; the whole app switches with one toggle.
landing.feat5B1: Every button, label, and message is bilingual
landing.feat5B2: Vietnamese is the default for parents
landing.feat5B3: Works well for centers with native English teachers
landing.feat6Title: Your center's data, only your center sees it
landing.feat6Body: Every center's data is fully isolated. No other center can read or interfere with yours, even though we all run on the same platform. The isolation is enforced at the database layer (Supabase Row Level Security), not just hidden in the UI.
landing.feat6B1: Supabase RLS — access control at the DB layer
landing.feat6B2: Daily backups, hosted on Vercel + Supabase
landing.howSubtitle: From signup to your first parent report in three steps.
landing.howStep1Title: Sign up and set up your center
landing.howStep1Body: Enter your center name, upload your logo, customise the report. 5 minutes.
landing.howStep2Body: Add them one at a time, or bulk-import from CSV. Parents can sign in by phone number; email isn't required.
landing.howStep3Title: Teachers log lessons; parents see them instantly
landing.howStep3Body: After class, your teacher logs the lesson in 60 seconds. Parents sign in and see their child's progress right away.
landing.howFooter: Most centers welcome their first parents within an hour of signing up.
landing.compareSubtitle: Running your center on Zalo plus Excel right now? Most centers I talk to are in the same spot.
landing.compareWithout1: Zalo messages mixed between parents, teachers, and personal life
landing.compareWithout2: Parents ask what their child learned; teachers reply individually
landing.compareWithout3: No idea which teachers are logging lessons consistently
landing.compareWithout4: Month-end means hand-writing reports for every parent
landing.compareWithout5: Parents don't see the value, hard to retain, hard to raise prices
landing.compareWith1: Messages organised per student, private and searchable
landing.compareWith2: Parents read reports themselves; no need to ask teachers
landing.compareWith3: Analytics show who's behind and who's on track
landing.compareWith4: PDF reports auto-generated; you just preview and send
landing.compareWith5: Parents see value every week, so retention and price-raising both get easier
landing.pricingLockInTitle: Lock in this rate for as long as you stay subscribed
landing.pricingLockInBody: These are launch rates while we're still new. Prices will go up as I add features, but anyone who signs on during launch keeps their current rate for as long as they stay subscribed.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Pay month-to-month while you try it, or commit to a longer plan and save.
landing.pricingMonthlyNote: Works out to 900,000 VNĐ / month. You save 1,800,000 VNĐ versus paying monthly.
landing.pricingAnnualNote: Pay yearly and save 4,500,000 VNĐ versus paying monthly. Plus you lock in launch pricing.
landing.pricingNote: Founding Center pricing locked forever. Every plan includes:
landing.pricingItem4: Zalo / email support and free updates
landing.pricingTrialInline: Cancel anytime · Setup help over Zalo

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything centers ask before they sign up.
faq.stillHaveBody: Message me on Zalo. I'll answer directly — no bot, no support team.
faq.a1: Yes. You can cancel anytime by messaging me on Zalo. Your account stays active through the end of the period you've already paid for.
faq.a2: Bank transfer, Momo, ZaloPay, or VNPay. I'll send payment details on Zalo after we discuss which plan fits your center.
faq.a4: Yes. Upgrade or change plans by messaging me on Zalo. Founding Center pricing stays locked if you upgrade to a longer commitment.
faq.a5: Most centers are fully set up in under 30 minutes. For Founding Centers I help walk through setup and teacher onboarding over Zalo.
faq.a6: Teachers only need to know 3 buttons to log a lesson. For Founding Centers I walk them through it over Zalo, about 30 minutes.
faq.q7: Can parents use it without downloading an app?
faq.a7: Yes. Parents receive reports via Zalo or open them in a web browser. No app installation needed.
faq.a8: Yes. Each center's data is fully isolated, so no center can see another center's information. All connections are encrypted.

landing.finalCtaTitle: Ready to run a more professional center?
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Message me on Zalo. Setup help over Zalo, locked-in Founding Center pricing.
landing.finalCtaTrust: Already have teachers + parents ready? Invite them right after signup.
landing.footerTagline: Professional management for English centers in Vietnam. Manage teachers, track lessons, and retain parents with automated PDF reports.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.effective: Last updated: 16 May 2026. Operator: Matthew Stadler — matthewstadlers14@gmail.com
privacy.smallOpBody: Klazly is operated by Matthew Stadler, an individual founder based in Hai Phong, Vietnam. As a small operation, we may not have the formal infrastructure of large corporations, but we handle your data and your business with care. If anything in this document is unclear, message us directly on Zalo: +84 86 240 4036.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data Klazly (the Service, accessed at https://klazly.com) collects, why, and how it is handled.
privacy.whoBody: The Operator is Matthew Stadler, an individual based in Hai Phong, Vietnam, who designs and runs the Service. The Service is hosted on Vercel (web hosting) and Supabase (Postgres database, authentication, file storage). Data is stored in their US / EU data centers.
privacy.dataBody: Center admins, teachers, parents and students each have a record with name, email, phone, role and a link to their center. Lessons recorded by teachers are stored. Centers also have a name, contact info, optional logo, brand color, and subscription status. The Service is NOT designed for sensitive data — do not enter health records, ID/passport numbers, banking credentials, or anything similar.
privacy.useTitle: What we do with the data
privacy.useBody: We store the data so the center can view and use it, scoped per-center via Row Level Security so no center sees another center's data. We display it to the relevant users (admin sees their center; teachers see their classes; parents see their own children). We generate the printable PDF report when a parent requests it. We operate the Service: routine logging, backups, support replies. We do NOT sell or rent any data, do NOT use it for advertising, and do NOT train AI/ML models on it.
privacy.shareTitle: Who else can see the data
privacy.shareBody: Vercel processes requests as they pass through their hosting. Supabase stores the database, authentication records, and uploaded files. Resend may send transactional emails (e.g. password reset, lesson notifications) on our behalf. Each of these processors is bound by its own privacy commitments. We do not transfer data to any other third party.
privacy.retentionBody: While the center's subscription is active, all data is retained. After cancellation, data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted. Encrypted infrastructure backups may persist for up to 90 days.
privacy.rightsBody: You can ask the Operator to: see what data we hold about you; correct inaccurate data; export your data as CSV; delete your account and associated data. Email matthewstadlers14@gmail.com from the email on file, or message us on Zalo (+84 86 240 4036). We will respond within 14 days.
privacy.securityBody: All connections to the Service use HTTPS. Passwords are hashed (we cannot read them). Data isolation between centers is enforced at the database row level (Row Level Security). We don't claim a formal SOC 2 / ISO certification — see the 'About this document' section above on our scale as a small operation.
privacy.childrenBody: Students at a language center are typically minors. They do not have their own accounts on Klazly. Their personal information (name, age, behavior notes, attendance, homework completion) is provided to the Service by their parent or by the center on the parent's behalf, with the parent's consent obtained by the center under Vietnamese law. We do not collect data directly from children, do not advertise to them, and never share their information beyond the parent and the staff at their own center.
privacy.vietnamLawBody: We process personal data in line with Vietnamese law, including Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP on personal data protection. Centers operating in Vietnam remain the data controller for their staff, parent and student records; Klazly acts as the data processor that hosts and operates the platform on their behalf.
privacy.contact: Questions about this policy: matthewstadlers14@gmail.com · Zalo +84 86 240 4036

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.effective: Last updated: 16 May 2026. Owner: Matthew Stadler — matthewstadlers14@gmail.com
terms.smallOpBody: Klazly is operated by Matthew Stadler, an individual founder based in Hai Phong, Vietnam. As a small operation, we may not have the formal infrastructure of large corporations, but we treat your data and business with care. If anything in these terms is unclear, message us directly on Zalo: +84 86 240 4036.
terms.intro: By creating or using a Klazly center account (accessed at https://klazly.com) you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.serviceBody: Klazly is a hosted web platform that allows English language centers in Vietnam to record lessons and share progress with parents. The Service is licensed, not sold. The Owner retains full ownership of the software, source code, brand marks, database schema, and documentation.
terms.payBody: The Service is offered on 1-month, 6-month, or 12-month prepaid plans, paid by bank transfer or Vietnamese e-wallet (Momo / ZaloPay / VNPay). Pricing is published at https://klazly.com/pricing and may change for new subscriptions; existing subscriptions keep the price they signed at. Founding Center program: the first 5 centers receive 30 days free at onboarding and a locked discounted rate (about 50% off the standard plan) for as long as they remain subscribed. Trial periods for other centers are agreed individually at onboarding.
terms.refundBody: We don't offer refunds for unused portions of a prepaid plan. If you have a concern, message us directly on Zalo (+84 86 240 4036) and we'll work it out personally. You can cancel at any time by messaging us on Zalo; your account stays active through the end of the period you've already paid for, then moves to read-only.
terms.subTitle: Subscriber responsibilities
terms.subBody: Keep admin credentials confidential. Only enter data the Subscriber has the right to enter. Do not enter sensitive data the Service is not designed for (e.g. health records, banking credentials). Use the Service only for the lawful purpose of running an English language center.
terms.dataBody: Data you enter belongs to you. The Owner holds it on your behalf while your subscription is active. You can request a CSV export of all your data at any time. We will deliver it within 14 days at no charge. After cancellation, your data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted.
terms.licenseBody: The Owner grants the Subscriber a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the hosted Service while the subscription is active. The Subscriber may not copy, modify, redistribute, sublicense, reverse-engineer, or build a competing product from the Service.
terms.termBody: The Owner may suspend or terminate access if the Subscriber fails to pay any amount due for more than 30 days past due, breaches these Terms or the License, or uploads content that violates Vietnamese law or third-party rights.
terms.supportBody: Support is provided via Zalo (+84 86 240 4036) and email during business hours, Vietnam time. We aim to keep the Service running reliably. As a small team we don't guarantee a specific uptime number, but we respond quickly to outages and post incident updates at https://klazly.com/status.
terms.warrantyBody: The Service is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Owner is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, lost profits, or lost data. The Owner's total liability for any claim is capped at the amount the Subscriber paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.lawBody: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. We'll try to resolve any dispute directly first — message us on Zalo or email. If a dispute can't be resolved directly, the courts of Vietnam have jurisdiction.
terms.contact: Questions about these terms: matthewstadlers14@gmail.com · Zalo +84 86 240 4036

messages.composerPlaceholder: Type a message to the teacher…
messages.composerPlaceholderToParent: Type a message to the parent…
messages.messagesHelp: Private 1-on-1 thread about your child. Only you, the class teacher, and your center admin can see it.
messages.messagesEmpty: No messages yet. Say hello to your child's teacher.
messages.teacherEmptyHint: No messages yet. Say hello to the parent.
messages.notAllowed: You don't have permission to message about this student.
messages.teacherSectionHelp: Private 1-on-1 threads with each parent. Tap a student to read or start a message.
messages.teacherSectionStart: No messages yet — tap to say hello.
messages.threadNoParent: This student has no parent linked yet.
messages.fetchFailedHint: Messages aren't loading. Make sure the messages migration has been run in Supabase.
messages.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
messages.inboxSubtitle: Every private conversation in your center. Reply on the teacher's behalf if they're busy or out.
messages.inboxSubtitleWithUnread: Every private conversation in your center · {n} unread you may want to look at.
messages.inboxEmpty: No messages yet. Parents and teachers can start a private thread from a child's page.
messages.adminEmptyHint: No messages in this thread yet. You're viewing as admin — you can reply on the teacher's behalf.

import.title: CSV import
import.subtitle: Bulk-upload parents and students instead of adding them one by one.
import.parentsHelp: CSV with 4 columns: full_name, phone, email, password. Each row needs a phone number — email is optional. Password can be blank — the system will generate a random one. Phone accepts 0901234567, +84901234567, or formats with spaces / dashes.
import.parentsPasswordNote: Note: if you leave password blank, the system generates a temporary password for each parent — capture it before leaving the page. Parents can reset their own password later via the "Forgot password?" link on the login page.
import.studentsHelp: CSV with 4 columns: full_name, age, class_name, parent_email. Class name must match an existing class. Parent email must match an existing parent.
import.studentsNote: Tip: create parents first, then classes, then import students.
import.rowMissingContact: Each parent needs an email or phone.
import.rowMissingPhone: Each row needs a phone number. Email is optional.
import.duplicateInFile: Email or phone already appears on row {row}.
import.duplicateStudentInFile: This student (same name and class) already appears on row {row}.
import.tooManyRows: Too many rows. Max {max} per import — split the file into batches and upload again.
import.generatedHelp: These rows had no password in the CSV so we generated one. Save this list (Zalo, email, paper) — you can't see these again after you leave the page.
import.legacyHint: CSV import now lives on the Parents and Students pages — click below to jump straight in.
import.legacyParentsHint: Bulk-add parent accounts from a CSV.
import.legacyStudentsHint: Bulk-add students and link them to classes + parents.

worksheets.title: Center worksheets
worksheets.subtitle: Upload exercises, tests, and PDFs for your center. Teachers can attach them to individual lessons.
worksheets.name: Worksheet name
worksheets.uploadHelp: PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP. Max 5MB.
worksheets.badType: Unsupported format. Use PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP.
worksheets.deleteConfirm: Delete worksheet '{name}'? Lessons that attached this file will lose the link.
worksheets.lessonAttachHelp: Pick from the library or upload a new file (will be added to the library).

settings.title: Center settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your center's logo and information.
settings.logoSectionHelp: Your logo will appear on the parent dashboard and on printable PDF reports.
settings.logoUploadHelp: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Max 2MB.
settings.badType: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPG, or WebP.
settings.reportSectionHelp: Customise how your center's parent progress report looks when printed or saved as PDF.
settings.reportIntroPlaceholder: e.g. Dear parents, this report summarises your child's recent progress at our center.
settings.reportIntroHelp: Optional — appears below the report title. Up to 800 characters.
settings.reportFooterPlaceholder: e.g. This report is confidential. For inquiries, contact the front desk.
settings.reportFooterHelp: Optional — appears below the signature lines. Up to 400 characters.
settings.brandColorHelp: Used for the PDF accent bar, section underlines, and the auto-initials circle when no logo is uploaded. Leave blank for the default.
settings.brandCreditHelp: Small grey line at the bottom of each PDF report. Turn off for a fully white-label look.
settings.teacherReadOnlyNote: Printed report settings are managed by your center admin. Contact your admin if you need changes.
settings.programsSectionHelp: Define the programs your center offers (e.g. KET, IELTS, English Communication). Each class can be tagged with one of these so they group on the dashboard.
settings.programsRenamed: Renamed to '{label}'. Existing classes were updated.
settings.programsDeleteConfirm: Delete program '{label}'? Classes that use it will be set to no program.
settings.programsValidation: Please enter a valid program name (1–80 characters).
settings.programsSeedHelp: Adds Cambridge KET / PET / FCE, IELTS, TOEIC, English Communication, Young Learners. You can rename or delete them after.

subscription.trialActive: You are on a Founding Trial.
subscription.trialDaysLeft: Founding Trial, {n} days left. Message me on Zalo to continue.
subscription.trialExpired: Your trial has ended. Message me on Zalo to keep using the platform.
subscription.pastDue: Payment past due. Please get in touch.

demo.loadError: Could not load the demo. Please try again later.
demo.banner: DEMO · Read-only. Changes you make are not saved.
demo.heroSubtitle: Click around the whole platform with real-looking sample data. No signup needed.
demo.chooserSubtitle: Pick the role you want to experience. You can switch between all three at any time from the demo banner.
demo.roleAdminRecommendedHint: Start here — this is what the center owner uses every day.
demo.ctaBarBody: Message me on Zalo to onboard your center.
demo.roleAdminDesc: Dashboard, manage classes / teachers / students / parents, teacher activity analytics, center logo settings.
demo.roleTeacherDesc: View classes, record a new lesson in 60 seconds, attach worksheets, save lesson templates.
demo.roleParentDesc: See your child's progress — vocabulary, grammar, behavior, homework per lesson. Print a PDF report.

superAdmin.title: Platform admin
superAdmin.subtitle: Create new center accounts and their first admin user.
superAdmin.actionRequiredSubtitle: Trials about to lapse and recently expired centers — reach out before they go cold.
superAdmin.urgentHint: Trials expiring very soon. Reach out today.
superAdmin.warningHint: Approaching expiry. A friendly check-in now lifts conversion.
superAdmin.recentlyExpiredHint: Still warm leads — worth one more nudge to convert.
superAdmin.daysLeftShort: {n, plural, =1 {1 day left} other {# days left}}
superAdmin.daysAgoShort: {n, plural, =0 {expired today} =1 {expired 1 day ago} other {expired # days ago}}
superAdmin.notesPlaceholder: e.g. paid via BIDV Apr 2026, wants Excel export, referred by A…
superAdmin.planHint: Leave blank while the center is on trial. Update when they convert to a paid tier.
superAdmin.planTypeHint: Internal classification — never shown to the customer. Founding Centers get the locked discounted rate; Design Partners are free-forever.
superAdmin.sourceOtherPlaceholder: How did they hear about us?
superAdmin.foundingFootnote: Founding Center program is internal only — never shown on the public landing or pricing page.
superAdmin.foundingSlotPanelHint: {filled} of {cap} slots filled. The next available slot is pre-filled — change it if you've reserved a specific number.
superAdmin.foundingOverrideLabel: All {cap} slots are filled. Tick to create past the cap anyway (slot will be assigned beyond the limit).
superAdmin.foundingSlotTakenInlineWarn: Slot #{n} is already taken — pick a different number.
superAdmin.foundingSlotTakenError: Slot #{n} was just claimed by another save. Pick a different slot and try again.
superAdmin.foundingAllSlotsTakenError: All {cap} Founding slots are filled. Tick the override box to proceed past the cap.
superAdmin.createConfirmDescription: Creating "{name}" with plan {plan}. This sets the initial billing dates — you can still edit later, but the plan choice anchors the first cycle.
superAdmin.createSubtitle: Create the center and its first admin user in one step.
superAdmin.createdHint: Created center {center}. The admin can log in with {email}.
superAdmin.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete center {name} and ALL its data (teachers, parents, classes, students, lessons)? This cannot be undone.
superAdmin.expiredHint: They still have all their data — a quick Zalo nudge often wins these back.
superAdmin.manageDialogDescriptionConvert: Pick the plan they're paying for. We'll mark today as the start date and set the next billing date automatically.
superAdmin.manageDialogDescriptionChange: Switch their plan, or use the reset section below to put them back on trial.
superAdmin.manageDialogDescriptionRenew: Their current plan period ends soon. Renew the same plan to extend the cycle, or pick a different one.
superAdmin.manageDialogDescriptionReactivate: Pick a plan to reactivate on, or use the reset section below to start a fresh 30-day trial.
superAdmin.revertSectionHint: Made a mistake on the plan, or want to put them back on trial for any reason? This cancels the active cycle and starts a fresh 30-day trial today.
superAdmin.revertDialogDescription: Their current paid plan will be cancelled and a new 30-day trial will start today. Plan tier (Standard / Founding) and slot number are kept — only the active billing cycle clears.
superAdmin.auditRenewalDue: Active period ended — flagged for manual renewal
superAdmin.renewalDueBannerHint: Click "Renew or change plan" above to extend their cycle or switch them to a different plan. Payment is collected manually over Zalo.
superAdmin.convertDialogDescription: Pick the plan they're paying for. We'll mark today as the start date and set the next billing date automatically.
superAdmin.convertFoundingMetaWillAssign: Slot will be assigned on confirm
superAdmin.convertFoundingMetaAllTaken: All {cap} Founding Center slots are taken
superAdmin.convertFoundingDialogDescription: Locks in the Founding rate as their active monthly subscription. The price is per their Founding agreement and won't change with future price updates.
superAdmin.convertFoundingSubhead: Founding Center #{n} · billed monthly starting today
superAdmin.extendDialogDescription: Push the trial end date forward. If the trial already lapsed, the new end date is counted from today.
superAdmin.lockDialogDescription: Users at this center will see the lock screen on their next page load. Their data is preserved — unlock by clicking Reactivate later.
superAdmin.lockDialogDescriptionNamed: Users at {name} will see the lock screen on their next page load. Their data is preserved — unlock by clicking Reactivate later.
superAdmin.pauseDialogDescription: They'll lose access until you reactivate. Billing stops where it is — no charges, no clock advance. Their data is preserved.
superAdmin.cancelDialogDescription: This archives the center. Use 'Pause' instead if they might come back. To confirm, type the center name exactly as shown.
superAdmin.reactivateDialogDescription: Re-opens access immediately with a 7-day courtesy trial. You can extend further or convert to paid after they get back in.
superAdmin.reactivateFoundingDescription: Resumes their subscription as Active Founding at the locked monthly price. Stamps a new billing anchor today.
superAdmin.reactivateStandardDescription: Pick which paid plan they're resuming on — the picker defaults to what they were on before.
superAdmin.reactivateResumeTrialHint: Their trial date hasn't passed yet. Want to put them back on trial instead of converting?
